title: ProtocolLab public report contract verification
scope: Verify the public report contract is represented by storage-neutral schemas and documentation.
preconditions: Public report schemas remain under schemas/public-report/v1/.
procedure: Confirm report documentation preserves public-safety and claim-boundary language.
Confirm report SpecTrace artifacts do not define implementation-owned upload or runner workflows.
expected_result: Public report contracts remain schema-backed, storage-neutral, and aligned with public safety requirements.
